15.reason: [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression. Use fgets or a loop with getchar instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression. Use fgets or a loop with getchar instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes the program to read only part of the expression before '=' and miss the rest, leading to incorrect parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Using scanf with %s reads only until the first whitespace, but the input expression may contain spaces. This causes incomplete reading of the expression. Use fgets or another method to read the full line including spaces.]
